changes.✨ New Features:
- **`/wiz` Command Group**: Full Wizard101 wiki integration powered by WizWiki
  - `/wiz creature` - View boss/enemy stats, cheats, and drops with **paginated display** (Overview → Cheats → Drops)
  - `/wiz spell` - Spell details including school, accuracy, pip cost, and training info
  - `/wiz item` - Equipment stats, card grants, and drop sources
  - `/wiz recipe` - Crafting requirements, vendors, and ingredient lists
  - `/wiz location` - World details, sub-areas, maps, and connections
- **School-Aware Coloring**: All `/wiz` commands feature dynamic color coding matching the school (Fire, Ice, Storm, Death, Life, Myth, Balance, Shadow, Sun, Moon, Star)
- **School Emoji Icons**: Dynamic emoji displays in headers and stats, with custom emoji support from external servers
- **Custom Emoji Support**: Configure custom school emojis with automatic fallback to default Unicode if unavailable
- **WizWiki Branding**: All `/wiz` commands include a "Powered by WizWiki" footer linking to the WizWiki repository
changes.🛠️ Improvements:
- **Intelligent Cheat Parsing**: Boss cheats are parsed and split into individual readable entries (handles both quoted format like Malistaire and plain text format like Morganthe)
- **Paginated Creature Display**: Creature command now splits Overview, Cheats, and Drops into separate pages with Previous/Next navigation
- **Truncation Safety**: Three-level truncation system prevents Discord's 4000 character limit errors:
  - Per-cheat truncation (400 chars)
  - Per-page limits (4 cheats displayed)
  - Final content truncation (3850 chars)
- **Ephemeral Messages**: All `/wiz` commands (and other bot commands) now use proper ephemeral messaging so only the command user sees responses
- **Astral School Support**: Full support for Sun, Moon, and Star schools with colors and emojis
changes.🐛 Bug Fixes:
- Fixed cheat parsing for bosses with concatenated cheat descriptions (Malistaire, Morganthe)
- Fixed emoji fallback system to gracefully handle missing custom emojis
- Fixed Discord character limit errors on complex boss pages
changes.📚 New Dependencies:
- `re` (regex) for intelligent cheat parsing
- Integration with WizWiki library (already installed)
